failure_reason: Added executable BMF/BML compiler-picture model cells and a sibling-kernel proof band. Initial validation exposed two concrete issues: a raw section marker inside a string was consumed by the source compiler, and a local test binding shadowed the compiler-flow function under dynamic scope. Fixed both. The picture proof returns 112251 across Go/Rust/TypeScript; existing BMF and BML compiler runtime bands remain green.
